purpose: VC0 visual closure inventory. Statuses are intentionally honest: source-code presence is not scene readiness.

entries.hero: A single book-cover title field, restrained crest, and one dominant lantern establish the first promise.
entries.support: Supporting frames use the shared indigo, soot, vermilion, warm-gold, and paper-material family without competing with the hero.
entries.groundContact: Characters, facilities, combatants, or document planes use explicit borders, feet, shadows, or contact mattes appropriate to this surface.
entries.depth: Background atmosphere, the decision-bearing middle layer, and a restrained foreground are separated without covering controls.
entries.people: When people are present, identity, direction, state, scale, and grounding are kept together; otherwise the authored object or document remains the scale anchor.
entries.ui: The primary next action is visually dominant, persistent information is grouped, 360-1600px layouts remain operable, and close/back targets meet the interaction contract.
entries.motionSound: Ambient motion stays subordinate to decisions, respects reduced motion, and uses the existing world/audio hooks without adding per-button sound.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

entries.hero: yoi_forest has an authored region profile with a unique landmark, silhouette, danger shape, and navigation rule.
entries.support: The profile combines exactly two tactile ground materials with a macro-biome value family and bounded ambient population.
entries.groundContact: The code-native layer paints material marks beneath route glyphs, entrance landmark, gather points, player, and danger telegraphs.
entries.depth: Macro-biome floor, unique silhouette/landmark, route marks, actors, and restrained ambient particles form separate readable planes.
entries.people: The party marker remains above ground contact and below route-critical overlays; no decorative portrait or nameplate is added to the walking field.
entries.ui: Visited, selected, locked, rare, and boss meaning remains encoded by state and shape, not palette alone; navigation mechanics are unchanged.
entries.motionSound: Each profile declares bounded ambient motion plus a world-sound family; reduced-motion and no-safe-one-shot fallbacks avoid misleading UI audio.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

entries.hero: family-tree keeps one task, message, or decision as the overlay focal point.
entries.support: Supporting copy and secondary controls are grouped inside the same material frame without becoming another full page.
entries.groundContact: The overlay edge, shadow, and scrim or fixed toast stack separate it from the world while preserving context.
entries.depth: World context remains behind the interaction plane; focusable controls and alerts stay on the top readable layer.
entries.people: Portraits appear only when they are part of the task; decorative people are not inserted into utility overlays.
entries.ui: Open, close, outside click, Escape, focus return, empty, and error states follow the shared dialog or sheet contract.
entries.motionSound: Entry motion is restrained and removed under reduced-motion; global button sound remains centrally attached.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

entries.groundContact: The overlay edge, shadow, and scrim or fixed toast stack separate it from the world while preserving context.
entries.depth: World context remains behind the interaction plane; focusable controls and alerts stay on the top readable layer.
entries.people: Portraits appear only when they are part of the task; decorative people are not inserted into utility overlays.
entries.ui: Open, close, outside click, Escape, focus return, empty, and error states follow the shared dialog or sheet contract.
entries.motionSound: Entry motion is restrained and removed under reduced-motion; global button sound remains centrally attached.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

entries.hero: toast keeps one task, message, or decision as the overlay focal point.
entries.support: Supporting copy and secondary controls are grouped inside the same material frame without becoming another full page.
entries.groundContact: The overlay edge, shadow, and scrim or fixed toast stack separate it from the world while preserving context.
entries.depth: World context remains behind the interaction plane; focusable controls and alerts stay on the top readable layer.
entries.people: Portraits appear only when they are part of the task; decorative people are not inserted into utility overlays.
entries.ui: Non-modal notices announce status, auto-dismiss, and expose a 44px manual close target without stealing focus.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

entries.hero: One revealed deity portrait and the permanently visible odds make each free star lot legible without monetized urgency.
entries.support: Supporting frames use the shared indigo, soot, vermilion, warm-gold, and paper-material family without competing with the hero.
entries.groundContact: Characters, facilities, combatants, or document planes use explicit borders, feet, shadows, or contact mattes appropriate to this surface.
entries.depth: Background atmosphere, the decision-bearing middle layer, and a restrained foreground are separated without covering controls.
entries.people: When people are present, identity, direction, state, scale, and grounding are kept together; otherwise the authored object or document remains the scale anchor.
entries.ui: The primary next action is visually dominant, persistent information is grouped, 360-1600px layouts remain operable, and close/back targets meet the interaction contract.
entries.motionSound: Ambient motion stays subordinate to decisions, respects reduced motion, and uses the existing world/audio hooks without adding per-button sound.

provenance.reviewer: Codex local integration; human art direction and rights clearance remain external gates.

promotion.note: Local source/runtime integration only. No row becomes scene-integrated until every required state, all five canonical viewports, and mechanical checks have repository evidence.
